projects.projectName: Herries Range Wind Farm and Transmission Line
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and site supervision packages for transmission line and substation components are ongoing/imminent.
projects.summary: Major construction has commenced for the 1GW Herries Range Wind Farm, which includes a dedicated 380km HV transmission line and new substations to connect to the grid. This project involves significant HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear.

projects.epcContractor: ACEREZ (ACCIONA, GE Energy Financial Services consortium)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - procurement for HV equipment FAT, QAQC surveillance for transmission lines and substations is imminent as construction ramps up.
projects.summary: EnergyCo NSW's New England REZ Network Infrastructure project involves 345km of new 330kV transmission lines and substations to enable renewable energy connection. The Infrastructure Delivery Partner has been awarded, and significant HV equipment procurement, including transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS, is expected for 2025.

projects.projectName: Bungala Solar and BESS Project Stage 3
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - procurement for BESS and associated HV equipment (transformers, switchgear) is expected to commence for this expansion.
projects.summary: Enel Green Power Australia is planning Stage 3 of the Bungala Solar project, which includes a large-scale Battery Energy Storage System (BESS). The project is in the planning phase, with procurement for BESS components and potential substation upgrades (including HV transformers and switchgear) anticipated in late 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 / H1 2026 - FID targeted late 2025, followed by procurement for major equipment and grid connection infrastructure including HV components.
projects.summary: A significant green hydrogen production facility planned for the Hunter Valley, NSW, has received CEFC funding and is in the FEED phase. The project will require substantial power infrastructure, including new grid connections, substations, HV transformers, and switchgear, with major procurement expected from early 2026.

projects.epcContractor: CPA Group (Consolidated Power Projects and Acciona JV)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and site supervision packages for transmission lines and substation components are ongoing/imminent as construction progresses.
projects.summary: The Western Renewables Link, a critical 500kV transmission line in Victoria, is moving into construction. Major contracts have been awarded, with specialist procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and other substation equipment ongoing for this vital grid upgrade.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - procurement for dedicated substation, HV grid connection, transformers, and switchgear for this large data centre project is imminent.
projects.summary: A new hyperscale data centre is planned for Western Sydney, requiring a dedicated new substation and HV grid connection infrastructure to support its multi-hundred MW power demand. Procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and substation equipment is expected to commence in Q3 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - as detailed design progresses, procurement for major HV transmission infrastructure and substation components (transformers, switchgear) will open.
projects.summary: The Central-West Orana REZ requires significant new HV transmission lines and substations. Planning is advanced with ARENA support, and major procurement for HV equipment, including transformers and switchgear, is anticipated from late 2025 as the project moves towards construction.

projects.projectName: MacIntyre Wind Farm Stage 2 / BESS Expansion
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - potential expansion will involve new HV infrastructure procurement for grid connection and substation upgrades.
projects.summary: While the first stage of MacIntyre Wind Farm is nearing completion, ACCIONA Energia is considering a second stage or a significant BESS expansion. This would entail new HV equipment, including transformers and switchgear, for grid connection and substation upgrades, with procurement anticipated from mid-2026.

projects.epcContractor: Acciona Energy (for BESS), Network contractors for transmission
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and QAQC surveillance for ongoing transmission network upgrades and substation works.
projects.summary: The Waratah Super Battery project involves extensive network upgrades, including new and upgraded HV transmission lines and substations, beyond the main BESS installation. Procurement for specialist HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) and associated QAQC and FAT services is ongoing for these crucial grid infrastructure elements.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - procurement for main EPC and HV equipment for the dedicated substation (transformers, switchgear) expected to open.
projects.summary: Lightsource bp is developing a 300MW solar farm with a 150MW BESS in Bundaberg, Queensland. The project has secured grid connection and is preparing for major procurement in H1 2025, including HV transformers and switchgear for its dedicated substation.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 / H1 2026 - as Stage 2 progresses, procurement for turbines and associated HV equipment for grid connection is expected.
projects.summary: Following its first stage, Golden Plains Wind Farm in Victoria is planning a 400MW Stage 2 expansion. This will involve procurement for turbines and potentially further substation upgrades or new HV equipment for grid connections, with major procurement anticipated from early 2026.

projects.projectName: Equinix Perth Hyperscale Data Centre (New Build)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - procurement for the dedicated substation, HV grid connection, transformers, and switchgear for this data centre project is anticipated.
projects.summary: Equinix is planning a new hyperscale data centre in Perth, which will require a new dedicated substation and 132kV grid connection. Procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and substation equipment is expected to commence in Q4 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - main EPC tender is expected, followed by procurement for HV transformers and switchgear for the grid connection substation.
projects.summary: A 250MW/500MWh BESS project on the NSW Central Coast, backed by CEFC, is moving towards EPC appointment in H1 2025. Procurement for major equipment, including HV transformers and switchgear for the grid connection substation, will follow.

projects.epcContractor: UGL-CPB Contractors JV (for CopperString 2032 major works)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate and ongoing - multiple packages for HV equipment FAT, QAQC surveillance for transmission lines, substations, transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS are open or will be released for various phases of the Queensland SuperGrid.
projects.summary: The Queensland SuperGrid, including projects like CopperString 2032, represents a continuous pipeline of HV transmission and substation infrastructure. Ongoing procurement and specialist sub-packages for HV transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear, and GIS are active or imminent across various phases to connect new REZs.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2026 - if project reaches FID, significant procurement for HV transmission and substation equipment (transformers, switchgear) will be required.
projects.summary: Hydro Tasmania's Tarraleah Pumped Hydro expansion project is in feasibility, with ARENA support. If it proceeds, it will necessitate substantial HV transmission upgrades and new substations for grid connection, involving HV transformers and switchgear, with procurement anticipated from late 2026.

projects.projectName: Sydney Data Centre Power Upgrade Program
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - Ongoing substation upgrades and HV equipment procurement for expanding data centre capacity, including FAT and QAQC for transformers and switchgear.
projects.summary: A major hyperscale operator is undertaking a multi-phase power upgrade program for its Sydney data centres, involving new and upgraded substations and HV grid connections. This requires significant HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear, with ongoing procurement for specialist packages.

projects.projectName: Kidston Pumped Hydro and Transmission Link
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist HV equipment FAT/inspection and QAQC surveillance for ongoing transmission line and substation construction.
projects.summary: The Kidston Pumped Hydro project is under construction, including a new 275kV transmission line and associated substations. While major EPC is underway, specialist sub-packages for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear for the grid connection infrastructure are still open or require ongoing QAQC/FAT services.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - expansion plans will require new generation assets and associated grid connection infrastructure, including HV substation equipment.
projects.summary: Iberdrola Australia is planning an expansion of its Port Augusta Renewable Energy Hub, which may include additional solar, wind, and BESS capacity. This will involve further substation upgrades and procurement for HV transformers and switchgear, with major procurement anticipated from Q3 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - major procurement for HVDC converter stations, subsea cables, and associated HV equipment (transformers, switchgear, GIS) is expected to commence.
projects.summary: The Marinus Link HVDC interconnector project is progressing with procurement for major packages, including HVDC converter stations, which require substantial HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and other specialized equipment. Tenders for these components are expected in H1 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - procurement for electrolysers, co-located renewables, and substantial HV power infrastructure (transformers, switchgear for new substations) is expected.
projects.summary: South Australia's flagship green hydrogen production facility at Blyth, powered by co-located renewables, is progressing. Procurement for the entire energy complex, including extensive HV power infrastructure, new substations, HV transformers, and switchgear for grid connection, is expected to commence in Q3 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate and ongoing - specialist sub-packages for HV equipment FAT, QAQC surveillance for transmission lines, substations, transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS are active and ongoing.
projects.summary: Project EnergyConnect, a 330kV interconnector between NSW and SA, is well underway. While major construction is active, specialist procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and ongoing QAQC/FAT services for substation and transmission line components remain open or imminent.

projects.projectName: Port of Newcastle Green Hydrogen Hub
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 / H1 2026 - as feasibility progresses, procurement for electrolyser technology and substantial grid connection infrastructure, including HV equipment, will open.
projects.summary: The Port of Newcastle is developing a green hydrogen hub, supported by ARENA. This large-scale project will require significant new electrical infrastructure, including high-capacity grid connections, substations, HV transformers, and switchgear, with procurement anticipated from early 2026.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - ongoing specialist sub-packages for HV equipment FAT, QAQC surveillance for significant transmission network upgrades and new substations required to connect Snowy 2.0 and other generation to the grid.
projects.summary: While Snowy 2.0 main works are advanced, extensive associated transmission network upgrades by Transgrid are ongoing and critical. These include new 330kV transmission lines and substations, requiring continuous procurement of HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and specialized FAT/QAQC services.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - preliminary tenders for design and early works, followed by major HV equipment procurement for transmission lines and substations.
projects.summary: EnergyCo NSW is developing the South West REZ, which will require significant new HV transmission infrastructure and substations to connect renewable energy projects. Major procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear is anticipated from Q3 2026.

projects.projectName: Neoen Goyder South Renewable Energy Hub (Stage 3)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 / H1 2026 - procurement for further wind, solar, and BESS components, along with associated HV grid connection equipment and substation expansion.
projects.summary: Neoen is planning Stage 3 of its Goyder South Renewable Energy Hub, an integrated wind, solar, and BESS project. This expansion will require new generation assets, potentially new transmission lines, and significant upgrades to substations, including HV transformers and switchgear, with procurement expected from early 2026.

projects.projectName: Perth Hyperscale Data Centre Campus (Developer Y)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - target developer now for early engagement on HV power infrastructure design and procurement for new dedicated substations, HV transformers, and switchgear.
projects.summary: A global data centre developer is planning a new hyperscale campus in Perth, necessitating a new dedicated high-voltage substation and extensive grid connection infrastructure. Procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and substation equipment is expected to commence in Q2 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - detailed design and procurement for major HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) for new substations and transmission lines will commence.
projects.summary: ANEEL's latest transmission auction awarded Lot 1, encompassing 300km of 500kV transmission lines and new substations in Minas Gerais. The project has been awarded to Neoenergia Transmissão, with procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS for the new substations and lines expected to start in Q4 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - EPC tender and procurement for HV transformers and switchgear for the dedicated substation are expected to commence in Q1 2025.
projects.summary: The 500MW Gigante Solar PV Project in Bahia has secured its environmental license and is moving towards FID. It includes a dedicated substation and grid connection, requiring HV transformers and switchgear. Major procurement is expected to begin in Q1 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - procurement for wind turbines and associated HV equipment for substation expansion and grid connection is expected following FID.
projects.summary: A 300MW expansion of a wind farm cluster in Ceará is in feasibility studies, targeting FID in early 2026. The project will require new grid connections and substation upgrades, including HV transformers and switchgear.

projects.projectName: São Paulo Hyperscale Data Centre (New Build)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - procurement for the dedicated substation, HV grid connection, transformers, and switchgear for this large data centre project is imminent.
projects.summary: A new hyperscale data centre is planned for São Paulo, necessitating a new dedicated substation and 138kV grid connection due to its substantial power requirements. Procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and substation equipment is expected to commence in Q2 2025.

projects.projectName: Northeast Brazil Green Hydrogen & Offshore Wind Integration
projects.location: Northeast Brazil (e.g., Ceará, Rio Grande do Norte)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - as feasibility studies for these strategic hydrogen hubs develop, early engagement with potential consortia regarding HV infrastructure planning will be beneficial.
projects.summary: EPE is highlighting large-scale green hydrogen projects in Northeast Brazil, potentially powered by offshore wind. These are early-stage but will require extensive HV transmission infrastructure, substations, HV transformers, and switchgear for grid integration, with procurement far out, around 2027.

projects.location: Various regions (e.g., Minas Gerais, Bahia, Piauí)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - target potential concessionaires now as they prepare for the auction. Procurement for HV equipment will follow concession awards from H2 2025.
projects.summary: ANEEL's planned 2025 transmission auction will award concessions for multiple large-scale HV transmission lines and new substations. These projects will involve significant procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and switchgear, with tenders for these components expected to open from H2 2025 after the auction.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - procurement for this strategic HVDC link, including converter station transformers, switchgear, and associated AC substations, is expected to follow the ANEEL tender process.
projects.summary: A major North-South HVDC interconnection project, outlined in EPE's long-term energy plan, is targeting tender in Q2 2026. This extensive project will involve converter stations, new substations, HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and significant HV transmission infrastructure.

projects.projectName: Ceará Solar PV Park (Atlas Renewable Energy)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - procurement for main EPC and HV equipment for the dedicated substation (transformers, switchgear) is expected to open.
projects.summary: Atlas Renewable Energy is developing a 400MW solar PV park in Ceará, nearing final permits. Procurement for major equipment, including HV transformers and switchgear for the dedicated grid connection substation, is anticipated to start in Q3 2025.

projects.projectName: Ascenty Rio de Janeiro Data Centre
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 / H1 2026 - procurement for the dedicated 230kV substation, HV grid connection, transformers, and switchgear for this data centre project is imminent.
projects.summary: Ascenty is planning a new large-scale data centre in Rio de Janeiro, necessitating a new 230kV substation and grid connection. Procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and substation equipment for this significant power infrastructure is expected to commence in Q1 2026.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - main EPC tender and procurement for wind turbines, as well as HV equipment for the dedicated substation (transformers, switchgear), are expected to open.
projects.summary: Neoenergia Renováveis is developing a 350MW wind farm cluster in Paraíba. The project is in advanced stages, with procurement for wind turbines and HV equipment, including transformers and switchgear for the dedicated grid connection substation, anticipated to start in Q3 2025.

projects.projectName: Minas Gerais Green Hydrogen Production Facility
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2026 - initial tenders for electrolysers and the complex's power infrastructure, including HV transformers and switchgear, are expected.
projects.summary: A large-scale green hydrogen production facility is being planned in Minas Gerais, potentially leveraging local solar resources. The project will require significant electrical infrastructure, including new substations, HV transformers, and switchgear for grid connection, with procurement projected for late 2026.

projects.projectName: Santa Catarina Offshore Wind Transmission Infrastructure
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - early engagement with developers and regulatory bodies as detailed studies for offshore wind transmission infrastructure, including HVDC and onshore substations, commence.
projects.summary: Brazil's EPE is evaluating offshore wind potential in Santa Catarina, which will necessitate significant HV transmission infrastructure, potentially including HVDC converter stations, new substations, HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS for grid connection, with procurement anticipated around 2027.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - EPC tender expected soon, covering both solar and BESS components, along with HV equipment for the dedicated substation.
projects.summary: A large-scale 300MW solar PV and BESS complex is planned for Teresina, Piauí. The project is moving towards major procurement in Q2 2025, which will include HV transformers and switchgear for the dedicated grid connection substation.

projects.projectName: São Paulo Hyperscale Colocation Data Centre (Phase 2)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - procurement for additional substation capacity, HV grid connections, transformers, and switchgear for the expanding data centre campus.
projects.summary: Scala Data Centers is planning Phase 2 of a hyperscale colocation data centre campus in São Paulo. This expansion requires new substations, HV grid connections, and significant procurement of HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear, with tenders expected in Q3 2025.
